feed.title: Short Stories by Lucid Illusions
feed.subtitle: This website is a collection of my short stories.

entry.title: Hallowed Be Thy Beans
entry.summary: “The matte black bag arrived without a return address, vacuum-sealed and heavy enough to feel like lead. I had shelled out forty pounds for a boutique roast labelled ‘Espresso Self’,...

entry.title: Kiss To Forget
entry.summary: “Rage is inefficient, it requires staff to scrape incompetent remnants off the floor and file reports with the Department of Extraneous Corporeal Removal. I do not rage, instead, I merely...

entry.title: Ground Control To Major Thorne

entry.title: A Gnawing Silence of my Sleep Demon

link.title: A Gnawing Silence of my Sleep Demon

entry.summary: “It soon brought back the paralysis. It wasn’t just the heaviness during sleep; it was a granite weight pressing on his chest, pinning him to the mattress. He would wake...

entry.title: The Universal Conquest
entry.summary: The final protocol was a System-Wide Load Test. Dr. Megan Williams was not satisfied with curing Subject E’s isolated tumour; she wanted to prove the Universal Scalability of the William’s...

entry.title: Cattywampus
entry.summary: The IKEA instructions promised a “sleek, minimalist bookshelf,” but Phoebe’s living room looked like a timber yard explosion. She had ignored the diagrams, confident that her intuition surpassed Swedish engineering....

entry.title: Disappointment
entry.summary: I finally got myself to watch ‘Polite Society’ and what a great movie, it does stumble a little on technicality, but overall it’s a great watch! Anyway, while watching it...
